race.comment: XTRASCENT (5) run down late from the wide gate on the Canberra Acton track two-back, then failed to handle the heavy conditions with a fading fourth over 1000m at Wagga. Comes here in peak condition and should prove too good for this lot. WON FOR VICKI (10) bumped into the handy Star Of Lily two-back, then a month between runs with a battling third over 1005m at the Sapphire Coast. Finds a weaker race and has solid top-three claims. ARGANTORATI (6) returns from a lengthy break after having mixed luck last prep. Back with the two trials and can surprise fresh. MANDY CANRUN (9) is a Prized Icon filly out of Metallic Spark on debut for the Kerry Parker yard. Won a recent Kembla Grange trial over 800m and gets her chance from the inside gate. Keep safe.
